honest_note: Form D reverse direction had thinnest direct bridge of A/B/C/D so far — no paper found that explicitly uses LLM induction-head as a predictive hypothesis for KC-MBON neuroscience. But the 2025 bioRxiv connectivity-bias paper already consumes the predictive content in the forward direction, and the architecture-to-algorithm framing PubMed 32283995 already does motif-bridging. So FAIL stands. The reverse direction is interesting and might warrant a continuation but not a paradigm-shift candidate.
